policy.notes: The scheduled radar may open or update a report-only PR. It must not advance source pins, advisory baselines, generated skills, provider/deployment config, secrets, or application code.

targets.name: Open Knowledge Format draft spec
targets.baseline_note: Initial OKF advisory baseline must be set through a separate human-approved PR after reviewing the current spec.
targets.recommended_action: Review draft spec changes only; do not copy spec text or change toolkit docs from the scheduled radar.

targets.name: Ponytail decision ladder patterns
targets.baseline_note: Initial Ponytail advisory baseline must be set through a separate human-approved PR after reviewing the decision-ladder material.
targets.recommended_action: Review concepts only; do not vendor hooks, plugins, dependencies, or upstream code from the scheduled radar.
